source_name: ADGM Courts Judgments (Abu Dhabi Global Market)
notes: Duplicate of AE/ADGM-Courts which already covers adgm.com with 143 judgments.
143 judgments (2017-present). SSR HTML + PDF on assets.adgm.com. Full text via pdfplumber.
~60 regulations/rules PDFs from ADGM courts legislation page + Abu Dhabi founding laws. Full text via PDF extraction.

source_name: Central Bank of the UAE Rulebook
notes: Drupal 10 site at rulebook.centralbank.ae. 192 regulation pages with full text (avg 97K chars). Banking, insurance, AML/CFT, consumer protection. English. 15 sample records.
8 enforcement cases in 2024. Fines exceeding $2.5M. Active enforcement.
~5,000 judgments (2007-present). Full text in HTML. CFI, Court of Appeal, SCT, Arbitration, T&C, DEC, Enforcement.
English-language common law court. CFI + Court of Appeal + Arbitration. Searchable. Also on BAILII.
139 PDFs (29 laws, 29 regulations, 17 amendments). Full text via PDF extraction.
69 enforcement decisions (Final Notices, Penalty Notices, Enforceable Undertakings). Full text via PDF extraction.

source_name: UAE Federal Tax Authority Guides and Public Clarifications
notes: 188 VAT + corporate tax + excise tax guides and public clarifications. Full text via PDF extraction.
elaws.moj.gov.ae geo-blocked (TCP timeout from non-UAE IPs). uaelegislation.gov.ae behind Cloudflare WAF (403). No public API. data.bayanat.ae also unreachable.
From issue #155. UAE official federal laws portal. Blocked by Cloudflare WAF. No accessible API found.
sca.gov.ae API at /api/PublicApi/GetContentList requires CSRF auth. Cannot access programmatically.

source_name: UAE Tax Disputes Resolution Committee Decisions
notes: TDRC decisions are not publicly published. Protected by Article 7 of Tax Procedures Law (confidentiality). Communicated only to parties (taxpayer + FTA). No portal, API, or database. Only known indirectly through law firm summaries and Federal Court appeals.

source_name: UAE Ministry of Justice Legal Portal
notes: Issue #343: site unreachable (connection timeout from both local and VPS).

source_name: Central Bank of Bahrain Rulebook and Circulars
notes: CBB Rulebook hosted on Thomson Reuters (cbben.thomsonreuters.com) - returns 403. Not open data. Laws page is JavaScript-rendered.
Returns 403 Forbidden
ahkam.sjc.bh times out (geo-restricted or JS-only). No public API. data.gov.bh has zero legal datasets. Eastlaws has content but is subscription-only.
Issue #405: DNS unreachable (lloc.gov.bh not resolvable from VPS or local). Domain may be down or geo-restricted.
Duplicate of BH/LLOCLegislation (same site: lloc.gov.bh = legalaffairs.gov.bh)

source_name: Bahrain National Bureau for Revenue VAT Guidance
license: Government of Bahrain, National Bureau for Revenue. Tax guidance published for public access. No formal open licence specified.
notes: 15 VAT/excise/DMTT guidance PDFs with full text. S3-hosted PDFs extracted via pdf_extract.

license: Official Algerian court decisions — public domain (government decisions). Published by the Cour constitutionnelle. Constitutional court decisions are public judicial acts under Algerian law.
notes: WordPress REST API. ~1200 posts, decisions split from year-grouped pages. Full text.

license: Official Algerian court decisions — public domain (government decisions). Published by the Cour supreme via WordPress. Court decisions are public judicial acts under Algerian law.
notes: WordPress REST API custom post type /decision. 1,261 decisions in Arabic. Full text.

source_name: Algeria Direction Générale des Impôts Guidance and Circulars (mfdgi.gov.dz)
notes: mfdgi.gov.dz returns HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. Web app in failure state.
WordPress REST API. ~1,261 decisions 2000-2023. Full text in Arabic.
cc.gov.eg requires login (username/email + password) to access judgments search. Legislations sidebar is public but judgments are behind auth.
eca.org.eg returns HTTP 500 Internal Server Error.

source_name: Egypt Tax Authority Executive Instructions and Sectoral Guidance (eta.gov.eg)
notes: Drupal 9 site but WAF blocks all API/JSON access

source_name: Egypt Tax Authority VAT and Tax Guidelines (eta.gov.eg)
notes: Drupal 9 site but WAF blocks all API/JSON access
fra.gov.eg shows 'You are not authorized to access this Page.' Access denied.
cc.gov.eg is actually the Court of Cassation (not Constitutional Court). All judgment search pages redirect to login (302). Requires account registration.
From issue #214. MIT-licensed dataset with 2,434 Egyptian laws. Full text (25M+ tokens, avg 87K chars/doc). Arabic content. Hugging Face datasets API. 15 sample records validated.

license: Official Egyptian court decisions — published by the Supreme Constitutional Court. Court decisions are public judicial acts under Egyptian law. Open government data.
notes: ~9,190 decisions via Django REST API. Arabic text from multiple fields.
Duplicate of EG/CourtOfCassation and EG/JACC. cc.gov.eg requires login for all judgment pages. ELPAI portal (elpai.idsc.gov.eg) has 460K+ listings but full text requires paid subscription.
Open-source tools to access Israeli Parliament data. Python library. Bills, votes, committees, members.

source_name: Israel Tax Authority Tax Circulars and Rulings (taxes.gov.il)
notes: taxes.gov.il retired → gov.il with Cloudflare managed challenge. ~207 Hebrew-only PDF circulars. All programmatic access returns 403.

From issue #219. Knesset OData API with KNS_Bill, laws tables. API works from Israeli IPs only. Returns maintenance page from US/EU. Requires VPN/proxy with Israeli IP. hasadna/knesset-data GitHub projects exist but also need Israeli IP.

knesset.gov.il entirely down for maintenance (OData API + PDF server). Hasadna mirror has CSV metadata but PDFs redirect to maintenance page. Nevo.co.il requires paid subscription. Retry when Knesset site is back online. Approach: OData API KNS_IsraelLaw + KNS_DocumentLaw for PDF URLs, extract text with pdfplumber.
Re-blocked: original issue (geo_blocked) not solvable by PDF extraction alone
2026-04-01 Still geo-blocked. HTTP 303 redirect to maintenance-page-geo from non-Israeli IPs. Hasadna mirror has metadata only, no full text. All knesset.gov.il endpoints require Israeli IP.

From issue #219. Hebrew University hosted. 16K+ Supreme Court decisions 2010-2018 with 61 variables. Downloadable SPSS/CSV datasets. Site times out from external IPs. May be geo-blocked or intermittent.
Cloudflare managed challenge blocks all programmatic access. No API. ASP.NET Web Forms with ViewState-dependent navigation. 27K+ legal texts 1917-present.
moj.gov.iq entirely unreachable (connection timeout on all URLs). Site appears geo-blocked or down. PDF extraction capability exists but site must be accessible first.
Site behind Cloudflare JS challenge, all requests return 403. No API. PDFs require headless browser + PDF extraction.
ArvanCloud CDN returns 403 on all requests. Likely geo-blocked or requires browser automation. No API discovered.
All Iranian legal databases geo-blocked from outside Iran (403/timeout). No APIs exist. Domain divanealee.ir defunct, migrated to eadl.ir which is also blocked.
cco.gov.jo (actual site) and jc.jo both timeout. Connection refused from both local and VPS. Blocked 2026-04-07.

Decisions section removed during site rebuild from OctoberCMS to ASP.NET. All /ar/decision/ routes return 404. No alternative API or open data portal available. Judges-only login with CAPTCHA. No viable programmatic access.

source_name: Jordan Income and Sales Tax Department Guidance (istd.gov.jo)
notes: Connection timeout from all tested locations. Site unreachable.

license: Official Jordanian legislation — public government data provided by the Legislation and Opinion Bureau. No formal open data license published; standard government copyright applies.
notes: All Jordanian legislation since 1921. Full text. Free access. Official government portal.

Issue #359: VPS IP blocked by lob.gov.jo (works locally, 0 records on VPS). ASMX web service with RSA/AES encryption. 6,495+ instruments: laws (1,707), bylaws (3,985), constitution (3), instructions (536), agreements (264). Full text from article-level API. Arabic.
droit-afrique.com returns 403 globally (htaccess misconfiguration on OVHcloud). Same as INTL/DroitAfrique. Revisit when site recovers.
Re-blocked: original issue (auth_required) not solvable by PDF extraction alone
Re-blocked: original issue (no_full_text_access) not solvable by PDF extraction alone

source_name: Kuwait Ministry of Finance Tax Circulars
license: Government of Kuwait, Ministry of Finance. Tax laws, circulars, and guidance published for public access. No formal open licence specified.
notes: 250 PDFs across laws, decrees, decisions, circulars, guidance manuals from mof.gov.kw. Full text extracted via PDF.
cassation.org domain is down (DNS failure). No open data portal for Lebanese court decisions. Only commercial databases (Sader, IDREL) exist. Ministry of Justice site has no decisions database.

From issue #228. Lebanese University Center for Legal Informatics. Contains all Lebanese legislation since Ottoman period (1920+). Only accessible on-site at Lebanese university libraries. Connection refused from external IPs.

No public API. Official Gazette (jo.pcm.gov.lb) requires paid subscription. Lebanese University Legal Informatics Center (legallaw.ul.edu.lb) is web-only with no API. No open data portal for legislation. Constitutional Council (cc.gov.lb) web-only.

From issue #228. Only 3 of 14 laws have PDF full text (Arabic PDFs). Other 11 laws including Constitution only show excerpts with circular "Read more" links. No API, no structured data. Full text requires paid SADERLEX subscription.

source_name: Lebanon Ministry of Finance Tax Circulars and Guidance (finance.gov.lb)
notes: SSL certificate verification error. Site inaccessible.
From issue #228. Official Gazette from Presidency of Council of Ministers. Requires paid subscription (10M or 5M LBP annual cards via LibanPost). No public API. Login required for all content.

source_name: Libya DCAF Security Sector Legal Database
notes: 2,175 Libyan legal texts via WP REST API. Full text in Arabic. Decrees, laws, resolutions, judicial decisions, bylaws. CC BY 4.0.
Cloudflare managed challenge on all pages. robots.txt explicitly blocks AI bots. WP REST API exists but inaccessible. Needs browser automation.

From issue #195. Ministry of Justice legal portal with Textes_Juridiques and Jurisprudence. DNS times out from external IPs (same as cspj.ma). data.gov.ma CKAN API works but has no legal datasets (only court statistics). Bulletin Officiel (sgg.gov.ma) also unreachable.
7,575 Moroccan legal texts via REST API + PDF extraction. Arabic/French.

source_name: Morocco Competition Council (Conseil de la Concurrence)
license: Kingdom of Morocco — official competition decisions and advisory opinions published for public access. No formal open licence specified; standard government copyright applies.
notes: 1269 posts via WordPress REST API. Full text in French. Competition decisions, merger control, advisory opinions.

From issue #195. Supreme Council of the Judicial Power portal launched Jan 2022. ~7,700+ decisions. Free public access. DNS resolution fails from external IPs (cspj.ma, cassation.cspj.ma domains). Likely geo-restricted or gov network issues. Site is indexed by search engines so it exists.

source_name: Morocco Direction Générale des Impôts Circular Notes and Guidance (tax.gov.ma)
notes: tax.gov.ma SSL/TLS handshake times out. Server unreachable from outside Morocco.

license: Official Moroccan gazette — Bulletin Officiel published by the Secretariat General of the Government. Official legislation texts are public acts of the Kingdom of Morocco. No formal open data license published.

notes: 15+ journal officiel issues with full text via PDF extraction. Avg 185K chars per issue.
10K+ English-translated Omani laws via WordPress API. Royal Decrees, Ministerial Decisions, Consolidated Laws, Treaties. 15 samples.

~11,800+ Arabic legislation via WordPress REST API. Royal Decrees (4,875), Ministerial Decisions (4,446), Official Gazette (875), Legal Opinions (687), International Agreements (680), plus more. Full text HTML.

source_name: Oman Tax Authority Circulars and Guidance
license: Government of Oman, Tax Authority. Royal Decrees, regulations, and tax guidance published for public access. No formal open licence specified.
notes: ~100+ PDFs across 9 categories (Income Tax, VAT, Excise, PIT laws/regulations/guidelines, DTAs). Full text extracted via pdf_extract. Arabic and English.
Site unreachable. Auth may be needed.
ID enumeration (2284-6500). ~4000 laws with full article text. Arabic with some English translations. Laws, decrees, amiri decisions, ministerial orders, cabinet resolutions (1954-2026).

source_name: Qatar Al Meezan Case Law Database
license: Official Qatari case law — published by the Ministry of Justice via Al Meezan. Court decisions are public judicial acts under Qatari law. No formal open data license published.

notes: Duplicate - Court of Cassation rulings already covered by QA/AlMeezanCaseLaw which fetches from almeezan.qa (same data source).
sjc.gov.qa is an administrative portal with no judgments; court decisions are on almeezan.qa (already covered by QA/AlMeezanCaseLaw).

source_name: Qatar General Tax Authority Circulars and Guidance (gta.gov.qa)
notes: ~28 tax circulars, decisions, and laws. English PDFs with full text extraction. Covers income tax, excise tax, withholding tax, global minimum tax.
SharePoint-based site — content dynamically rendered, no API or structured data endpoints found. SSL cert issues.

source_name: Saudi Bureau of Experts Laws Portal
notes: Site and all Saudi gov portals (od.data.gov.sa, istitlaa.ncc.gov.sa, boe.gov.sa) timeout from non-Saudi IPs. No API, no open dataset on HuggingFace/GitHub. ToS prohibit automated access. Requires VPS with Saudi IP.

source_name: Saudi Arabia Bureau of Experts Laws Portal
notes: Duplicate of SA/BOELaws. Site geo-restricted, unreachable from non-Saudi IPs.
cma.org.sa connection timeout. OpenData API is for market stats only, not regulations.

source_name: Saudi Arabia General Authority for Competition (GAC)
notes: gac.gov.sa returns 503 Service Unavailable.

source_name: Saudi Arabia Tax Dispute Resolution Committees (GSTC)
notes: gstc.gov.sa returns 404. Website appears non-functional.

source_name: Saudi Arabia National Competitiveness Center Open Data
notes: istitlaa.ncc.gov.sa connection times out. Also tried laws.boe.gov.sa — same timeout. Saudi government sites unreachable from this network.

API gateway at laws-gateway.moj.gov.sa requires JWT auth. Developer registration at developers.najiz.sa requires organizational account (government/company). 151 APIs available but all gated behind auth subscription.
sama.gov.sa ECONNRESET. Connection refused from tested locations.
Nuxt.js SPA on laws.moj.gov.sa. Backend API at laws-gateway.moj.gov.sa is behind Apigee with JWT auth (Saudi IAM/Absher). No public REST API available.

source_name: Saudi Arabia ZATCA Tax Guidance and Circulars (zatca.gov.sa)
notes: Duplicate of existing SA/ZATCA-Guidance (already complete)

source_name: Saudi Arabia ZATCA VAT Rulings and Decisions (zatca.gov.sa/VAT)
notes: Covered by existing SA/ZATCA-Guidance source
sudanlii.org domain does not exist (never registered). Sudan is not part of AfricanLII/Laws.Africa network. No programmatic API for Sudan legislation exists. Only ~65 PDFs available via REDRESS.
somalilii.org domain does not exist. Somalia not in AfricanLII/Laws.Africa. No national legislation database available. Only ~13 PDFs via Africa-Laws.org.

license: Syrian Arab News Agency (SANA) — official state news agency. Presidential decrees are public legal instruments. No formal open licence specified.
notes: Full-text presidential decrees from sana.sy (Arabic). ~104 decrees from transitional government (2025+). Parliament site offline; SANA is primary source. 15/15 samples validated (296-19K chars).
28 decisions (2005-2019) via Juricaf (AHJUCAF). Full text in French. ODBL license.

source_name: Tunisia Direction Générale des Impôts Tax Guidance (finances.gov.tn)
notes: Has Documentation Fiscale section but primarily PDF-based. No API or structured data access.

source_name: Tunisia Official Printing and Publishing Office (IORT)
notes: iort.gov.tn returns 403. legislation.tn times out. 9anoun.tn uses Livewire dynamic loading (needs Playwright). No programmatic access to Tunisian legislation full text without browser automation.

source_name: Journal Officiel de la République Tunisienne (JORT)
notes: Re-blocked: original issue (webdev_session_required) not solvable by PDF extraction alone

license: Managed by DCAF (Geneva Centre for Security Sector Governance). Copyright DCAF; all rights reserved per site footer. Underlying Tunisian legislation texts are official state acts.
notes: WordPress REST API at legislation-securite.tn. ~3954 texts, 80% with French full text. DCAF Geneva Centre for Security Sector Governance database.
legislation.tn consistently times out. Drupal-based CMS but unreachable. Alternative 9anoun.tn requires Livewire/Playwright.

Complete. Norm review (normkararlarbilgibankasi) 5.4K decisions + Individual applications (kararlarbilgibankasi) 16K+ decisions since 2012. HTML scraping with full text. 12 sample records avg 23K chars/doc. Open access.
Duplicate of TR/AnayasaMahkemesi which is already complete. Same data source (kararlarbilgibankasi.anayasa.gov.tr).

license: Government open access — Turkish Revenue Administration tax rulings (ozelgeler). Official government documents are publicly accessible; legal texts are not copyrightable under Turkish IP law (Art. 31 of Law No. 5846).
notes: 18,079 binding tax rulings (özelgeler) from GİB. Covers income tax, VAT, corporate tax, stamp duty. Full text via vergibulustayi.com aggregator + GIB data. Avg 8.5K chars/doc.

GIB Spring Boot REST API. 4448 total docs across 8 types (sirkuler/teblig/genelYazilar/icGenelge/cbk/bkk/yonetmelik/gerekce). ~3500 have inline full text; CBK/gerekce are PDF-only (skipped). No auth. Sample: 60 records, avg 7424 chars.
Code works fine locally (15 sample records with full text). VPS (Hetzner) IP blocked by mevzuat.gov.tr after ~2,686 records. Requires residential proxy or different IP range. Issue #160.
Duplicate of TR/MevzuatHF (complete, 907 laws). mevzuat.gov.tr VPS IP blocked.
907 Turkish laws with full text articles. Avg 19K chars/doc. MIT license.
COMPLETE: 10,239 board decisions via HTML scraping + PDF extraction. Covers mergers, competition violations, exemptions, privatization. 15 sample records avg 86K chars.

license: All rights reserved (Resmi Gazete). Official gazette content is publicly accessible; the site states all rights reserved per Turkish copyright notice. Official legal texts are not copyrightable under Turkish IP law (Art. 31 of Law No. 5846).
notes: COMPLETE: Turkish Official Gazette via archive HTML pages. Daily gazette since 1920. Laws, decrees, regulations with full text. 12 sample records avg 12K chars. Scrapes /eskiler/YYYY/MM/YYYYMMDD-N.htm pages. Classifies by section type (Kanun, Yönetmelik, Tebliğ, etc).
SPA with SSL certificate issues. No accessible API endpoint found.

license: Public domain — Turkish parliamentary proceedings (tutanak). Official legislative records are not subject to copyright under Turkish IP law (Art. 31 of Law No. 5846).

notes: TIER 2: Supreme court for civil and criminal matters. ~6 million decisions via Bedesten API. Full text from base64-encoded HTML. 23 Civil + 23 Criminal chambers. 12 sample records with full text.
